title: Rewrite app/api/notifications/send/route.ts to call service directly
completion_summary: Rewrote send route to call notification-engine directly, removed Python worker proxy
acceptance_criteria: Route no longer imports getBackendConfig or getCircuitBreakerStatus
Route no longer fetches to PYTHON_WORKER_URL
Route imports and calls sendNotification from notification-engine service
Verifies recipient and actor exist before sending
Error handling consistent with project patterns
